title: Duch-ArmorHUD
description: A Fabric HUD mod that displays your armor and item durability with item counts directly on screen.
body:
🛡️ DuchArmorHUD

Never break your armor mid-fight again. DuchArmorHUD adds a clean, fully customizable HUD that shows your armor and weapon durability — plus item counts for anything you want to track — right on your screen at all times.
✨ Features

Armor & Weapon Durability HUD
See the remaining durability of your helmet, chestplate, leggings, boots, and held weapon in real time. The sword/tool can be pinned to the top or bottom of the list.

Item Count Tracker
Track the count of any item in your inventory — arrows, potions, food, totems, you name it. Add any item ID and it shows up automatically.

Color-Coded Durability
Items change color as they wear down — green when safe, orange as a warning, red when critical. All thresholds are configurable.

Low Durability Warnings
Optional bounce animation and red pulse background when an item is about to break. Customizable speed, strength, and threshold.

Fully Configurable Layout

    Anchor to any corner of the screen (top-left, top-right, bottom-left, bottom-right)
    Custom X/Y offset and scale
    Row spacing and icon spacing
    Optional semi-transparent background with rounded corners and adjustable opacity
    Text shadow toggle

ModMenu Integration
All settings are available through a clean in-game config screen — no need to edit any files manually.
📦 Dependencies

    Fabric API
    ModMenu (optional, for in-game config)
    Duchessentials

🎮 Designed for Survival & SMP

Built for players who want to stay focused on the game without constantly opening their inventory to check gear. Lightweight, minimal, and stays out of your way.
